result.markdown: --- title: "Week 5: Debugging" --- ::: {.cell} ::: ## Main reference * [22 *Advanced R*](https://adv-r.hadley.nz/debugging.html) ## What you will learn this week * Debugging ## Online resources * [Creating a reprex](https://www.tidyverse.org/help/#reprex) * [Posit Community](https://community.rstudio.com) * [Stack Overflow](https://stackoverflow.com/) ## Pre-class activities * Watch [Object of type 'closure' is not subsettable](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=vgYS-F8opgE) with Jenny Bryan * Watch [Debugging in R](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=3YX-KyZ5Osw) with Jon Harmon ## Slides for week Download pdf * [Survey data](survey_data.csv) * [Exercise: MRE](survey_dplyr_bug.R) * [Exercise: traceback](01-traceback.R) * [Exercise: browser](02-browser.R) * [Exercise: debug](03-debug.R) * [Exercise: errors](04-errors.R) * [Exercise: warnings](05-warnings.R) * [Exercise: debug](06-debug.R) ## Assignments * [Assignment 1](../assignments/A1.qmd) is due on Tuesday 31 March.
